---
title: "\'A Conversation on Books\'"
---

## \'A Conversation on Books\'

**Author:** Gertrude Mary Ireland Blackburne
**Date:** 1885
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (April 1885), 368-75.

### Notes

A review of J. H. Shorthouse, [[otherbook:978]<i>The Little Schoolmaster Mark</i>] (1885).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
